name: socialforge
description: Agency-grade social media calendar automation, installable on **5 platforms** — Claude Code + Cowork (canonical), OpenAI Codex, Cursor, GitHub Copilot CLI (auto-discovers `.claude-plugin/plugin.json`), and Google Antigravity 2.0 (experimental `.antigravity/plugin.json`). Single `skills/` directory shared across all platforms. **v1.8.0** is the install-surface expansion. **v1.7.0** added Codex + Cursor manifests. **v1.6.0** added end-to-end-tested C2PA content provenance for EU AI Act Article 50 compliance (applicable 2 Aug 2026): new scripts/c2pa_sign.py wrapping c2pa-python 0.32, new /socialforge:c2pa-sign skill, and optional auto-sign hook in generate_image.py + video_postprocess.py. Also: May 2026 channel-pack reference (TikTok USDS structure post-Jan 2026, LinkedIn March 2026 algorithm + Depth Score, Apple MPP B2C open-rate decline, Meta Advantage+, YouTube AI labeling). v1.5 ships zero global hooks for clean multi-plugin coexistence — credential status now via /socialforge:status on demand. All 10 HTTP MCP connectors are Cowork-compatible.
